title: Part 3 – Conversation : problème informatique
instructions: Écoutez la conversation, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Woman: Excuse me, I'm having trouble connecting to the network. My laptop keeps saying 'authentication error.' Man: That's strange. Have you tried restarting it? Woman: Yes, twice, but it didn't help. Man: Okay, it might be a password issue. Did you recently change your company password? Woman: Actually, yes — I changed it yesterday. Man: That's probably it. Your new password needs to be synced. Come to my office and I'll update your credentials in the system. It should only take five minutes.

questions.prompt: What problem is the woman experiencing?
choices: She cannot connect to the network
questions.explanation: Elle dit : "I'm having trouble connecting to the network".

questions.prompt: What does the man think is causing the problem?
choices: Her new password not being synced
questions.explanation: Il explique : "Your new password needs to be synced".

questions.prompt: What does the man offer to do?
choices: Update her credentials in the system
questions.explanation: "Come to my office and I'll update your credentials in the system".
